---
title: "‘Adherence to the Apostolical Succession the Safest Course’"
---

## ‘Adherence to the Apostolical Succession the Safest Course’

**Author:** The Rev. John Keble
**Date:** 1833
**Imprint:** <i>Tracts for the Times</i>, no 4

### Notes

See also [[person:798]John Keble].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
